# Archived — do not use

This directory is a frozen snapshot of the original `Claude AI Development
Kit/`, previously located at the repository root. It was merged into
[`docs/engineering-handbook/`](../../) on 2026-07-12 and is kept here only
for historical reference.

**Do not edit these files. Do not link to them from any current document.
Do not treat anything in here as authoritative** — the merged, maintained
version of every document below lives in the parent handbook:

- `00_MASTER_CHARTER.md` here → superseded by
  [`docs/engineering-handbook/00_MASTER_CHARTER.md`](../../00_MASTER_CHARTER.md),
  which combines this file's Capability Ownership Map and numbered
  Non-Negotiable System Invariants with the newer charter's process
  sections (branching strategy, definition of done, review process, etc.).
- `01_SYSTEM_ARCHITECT.md` through `12_DEVOPS_ENGINEER.md`, and everything
  under `Architecture/`, `Knowledge Base/`, `Prompt Templates/`, `SOPs/`,
  and `Standards/` here → moved to the corresponding path one level up in
  `docs/engineering-handbook/`, unchanged in substance (only "Kit" →
  "handbook" terminology and a small number of path references were
  updated).

If you were looking for current guidance, go to
[`docs/engineering-handbook/README.md`](../../README.md) instead.
